name: Abalone
recipeInstructions:
1. Take the abalone to the back porch and bring a large mallet. Use the crowbar to remove the abalone from its shell.
2. Pound the abalone thoroughly with the mallet.
3. Heat an electric frypan until hot. Dredge the beaten abalone in milk, egg, and flour.
4. Flash fry the abalone quickly. Be careful not to overcook or scorch it, as this will make it rubbery.
5. Serve and enjoy the flavorful abalone. Consider sharing a bottle of fine wine with your company.
